state.title: runWorkspaceDeploymentInlineWithRetries\(

parts.text:
Blocking issue found:

- `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1598` only attempts provider-side cancel on retry if `latest.providerDeploymentId` is present, but that field is not persisted when the provider deployment is created (`createResult.providerDeploymentId` is only written on success at `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1262` / `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1275`).  
  - Impact: if a transient error happens after `createDeployment()` and a cancel is requested, the retry cancel path cannot call `provider.cancelDeployment(...)`, then marks the deployment cancelled locally (`packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1636`) while the provider deployment can continue running. That’s a correctness/cost leak and should block.  
  - Fix direction: persist `providerDeploymentId` immediately after `createDeployment()` (while still `running`) before entering polling/retryable sections.
